title: Packaged Sewage Treatment Plant Container Wastewater Treatment Sy
summary: The WPL range of package sewage treatment plants is specifically designed for properties not connected to mains drainage, providing on-site treatment for domestic and commercial wastewater applications.
bullets: No odors, no primary settlement required
No internal moving parts, minimal maintenance
Compact design for above-ground or underground installation

specs.label: Tank Material
specs.value: Carbon steel with epoxy anticorrosive paint or fiberglass coating
